title: Minimal complete repository-native software experiment compiler vertical slice

required_components.repository_facts: Content-address every tracked file and extract observable file, symbol, import, package-script, workflow, test, reference, and authority relations with exact SHA provenance.
required_components.representation_registry: Register implemented and future dialects with inputs, generator, verifier, admission conditions, supported claims, proof ceiling, cost, and fidelity requirement.
required_components.authority_dag: Compile authority routing and evidence-class ordering from repository facts.
required_components.dependency_graph: Compile observed dependency and proof/execution relations from repository facts.
required_components.invariant_hypergraph: Generate genuine cardinality-three-or-greater joint obligations from source, dependency, test, execution, and authority relations.
required_components.correspondence: Verify hypergraph membership and provenance against source facts as P2 evidence.
required_components.spectral_certificate: Compute a deterministic dominant eigenpair of the declared normalized hypergraph operator and verify its residual as a P1 model-property certificate.
required_components.task_diffusion: Use task-seeded dependency and hypergraph diffusion to rank mandatory context without claiming correctness.
required_components.effect_frontier: Compile typed first-through-fourth-order relationship effects with direction, evidence, uncertainty, and falsifier.
required_components.task_capsule: Bind task, exact base, fact/authority/model digests, selected representations, mandatory context, hard invariants, predictions, proof obligations, stop conditions, maximum patch, evidence classes, and blockers.
required_components.plan_admission: Reject source edits before plan admission and retain immutable experiment-root chronology.
required_components.evaluation: Run argv-based executable verification, compare changed paths with impact analysis, bind outcomes to predictions, and produce a non-promoting evidence ledger.
required_components.finish: Require valid certificate, correspondence, capsule, admitted plan, evidence ledger, prediction outcomes, and final transaction envelope.
required_components.query_interface: Expose deterministic authority, impact, invariant, proof, effect, and evidence queries as JSON.
required_components.self_test: Exercise start, admit, source edit, evaluate, finish, and verify in an isolated temporary Git repository.

proof_contract.P1: machine-verified property of an explicit formal model
proof_contract.P3: executable evidence on an exact software candidate
proof_contract.nonpromotion: No class automatically implies a stronger class.

security_contract: Verification commands are argv arrays executed without a shell.
All output paths are confined to the repository root.
P1 certificates name assumptions, model digest, correspondence digest, tolerance, residual, verifier, and excluded claims.
Dirty work is rejected by default and never silently reset or stashed.
deferred: mandatory enforcement based on causal outcome superiority
